features.name: Signup capture endpoint and storage
features.description: Server-side endpoint and Postgres table that persist email signups with deduplication on email.

features.name: Public landing page with signup form
features.description: One-page Next.js + Tailwind landing site (hero, features, signup form, footer) deployed on Vercel.

tasks.description: Define the Drizzle schema for the signups table matching the CTO spec (id uuid pk, email text not null, source text not null default 'landing-v1', created_at timestamptz, unique(email)) and re-export it from the schema barrel.
Implement POST /api/signup as a Next.js Route Handler: validate the email field, insert into signups, return { id, status: 'queued' | 'duplicate' } per the CTO contract.
QA the signup endpoint: submit a valid email (expect 200 + status: queued), submit the same email again (expect status: duplicate), submit a malformed body (expect 400). Document results.
Set up the Next.js 14 + Tailwind project skeleton, configure the Vercel deployment, and verify a placeholder page renders on the production domain.
Produce a layout spec for the landing page (hero, headline, 3 feature bullets, single-field email form, primary CTA, success/error states).
Implement the landing page UI per the design spec, including form validation, optimistic submit feedback, and success/error states wired to POST /api/signup.
